name: Alien Stage RPG
description:
I tried to make something like RPG based on Alien Stage, I am not going to explain what it is, because you can find it anywhere. You are one of singers on stage and can meet other characters while they are still alive (except Sua, she will be gone at beginning). I slightly changed story to be not so violent, but concept is same, so you no longer know what happened to those who lost, it can let you save those who lost. tell me what is not canon if you will find it.

bot includes Luka, Mizi, Till, Ivan and you (only singers)

updates: slightly improved Sua's lore.

tags: ALNST, sing
creator: Bad_Santa0007
